items.name: Guitar Sword
items.description: This axe is a sword!

items.name: Monster Fierce Basher
items.description: This aweseome bashing stick has a ton of ways for you to bring the pain to your foes.  If your enemies touch the stick they will take 5-8 damage. If hit by a swing they can expect 10-15 damage. Double click to do 20-25 damage or click and hold to super charge your swing and do 25-40 points of damage.

items.name: Bruin Mount
items.description: Ride in bearly affordable style. This baby bear will take you anywhere you want to go.

items.name: Chakram
items.description: Basically this is a flying ring with one very sharp edge all the way around. It hits hard, but has a long cool down time. It's best used to pick off enemies who are already damaged, or to seriously soften them up before entering melee combat.

items.name: Jack Frost
items.description: He's worse than the Christmas Creep!

items.name: Springtime Cutlass Of Infinite Virtue
items.description: The Prince of Infinite Virtue is in trouble and only you can save him from the evil that surrounds.  Duty calls!

items.name: Ancient Eagle Mount
items.description: Fly like an eagle, to the sea or anywhere else.

items.name: Merica Airwalker
items.description: Cuz this is my United States of Whatever....

items.name: Mad Morning Star
items.description: Not quite the good morning I was hoping for... Click to swing the mace and do mad damage to your foe.

items.name: Turkey's Vengeance Sword
items.description: Did you think turkeys were just going to sit there and take it while you ate them? No way - they're striking back...with a sword!

items.name: Bo Staff 7000
items.description: Use this futuristic Bo Staff to slash at your foes and do 15 damage.  Hit 'Q' to activate its special ability - a forcefield that instantly kills your foes.

items.name: Homemade Sword and Shield
items.description: This mighty homemade sword and shield set is perfect for any warrior.  The sword does 9-12 damage per hit. The mighty shield is activated when you press 'q'. This epic cardboard shield doubles your health and cuts down enemy damage by 50%.

items.name: Mardi Gras Sword
items.description: Laissez les bons temps rouler!  Your enemies don't stand a chance against this festive sword. Celebrate your victory over your enemies with a little confetti party.

items.name: Laser Sword and Shield
items.description: Protect the present with the weapon of the future, lasers!

items.name: Staff of Staff
items.description: This staff is ready to do maximum staff damage.  The Staff of Staff fires tiny damage-causing bloxikins at your foes to do 15 damage per hit.  Hit the 'Q' key to perform a special attack.

items.name: Magical Turkey Wand
items.description: Turn your enemies into the turkeys that they are!

items.name: Rubber Chicken Wand
items.description: Your enemy is coming at you fast and furious with the Darkheart Sword.  What do you do?  Turn the sword into a rubber chicken of course.

items.name: Unlucky Launcher
items.description: Shoot bad luck at your competitors by launching broken mirrors, umbrellas, and ladders at them! Upon impact, they trip onto the ground. There is a 30% chance they will temporarily be cursed with bad luck!  If they become unlucky they will suffer one of the following effects: They'll either be tripped nonstop, have a blurry screen, or have their walk speed revered so if they're walking forward, they are actually working backwards!

items.name: Beach Battle Sword
items.description: The battle for beach supremacy is on!  Send walls of water crashing on your enemies.

items.name: Champion Egg Beater Sword
items.description: Used to slay a magical dragon of old. This sword increases the chance of egg drops in PvP mode of the 2016 Eggventure. Click to swing the eggbeater and swipe them with it. While you swing, the eggbeater spins in a circular motion. Does 14 damage per hit.

items.name: Snowman Cannon
items.description: Launches your snowman sentries far and wide!  Your snowman foot soldiers will lock on an enemy target and fire away!

items.name: Garbage Can Shield and Wooden Sword Set
items.description: Sometimes you have to improvise....

items.name: Ne'Kotikoz Incarnate
items.description: Trade places with your intergalactic friend (or perhaps fiend?) and shoot fireballs at your enemies.

items.name: 2015 Fireworks
items.description: Light up the night to celebrate 2015!

items.name: Carnagecopia
items.description: Slam other players with some pretty explosive leftovers! If you manage to hit 3 or more players, FOODPOCALYPSE mode is activated!  In FOODPOCALYPSE mode you can rapid fire for 10 seconds.

items.name: The Sword of Shai
items.description: Your destiny awaits!  This sword has five different attacks, each does a varying amount of damage- anywhere from 6-12 points per hit.  One's fate is often not clear - so it's fitting that this sword of fate will will obscure the vision of your foes with a sand storm when they get within 20 studs of you.

items.name: Leprechaun Friend
items.description: You're lucky he likes you.

items.name: Otterhead Shortsword
items.description: The pommel is an otter head. That's so weird!

items.name: Dual Axe Monsters
items.description: These angry little monsters will follow you around and throw deadly axes at your foes!

items.name: DarkAge Ninjas: Combat Potion
items.description:
The DarkAge Ninjas are masters of hand to hand combat that none but the fiercest of warriors can handle. 

Drink this potion to increase your vitality to two fold, and to learn to spin kick, flash kick and charge kick in the face, decimating anyone who tries to fight you.
